passages.text: You may have heard that breakfast is the most important meal of the day. Many experts say that eating a good breakfast helps you concentrate at school or work. However, some people skip breakfast because they are in a hurry. If you do not have time in the morning, you can prepare something the night before. For example, you could make oatmeal or a smoothie and keep it in the fridge. A healthy breakfast should include protein, fruit and grains. Since I started eating breakfast regularly, I have felt more energetic throughout the day.

questions.question: Why do some people skip breakfast according to the text?
options: They do not like breakfast food

questions.question: What can you do if you do not have time for breakfast?
What has the writer experienced since eating breakfast regularly?

passages.title: You may have heard that breakfast is the most important m...

passages.text: Online learning has become very popular in recent years. Many students now take courses on the internet instead of going to a traditional classroom. There are several advantages to online learning. For instance, you can study at your own pace and from anywhere. On the other hand, you must be disciplined because nobody checks if you are doing your work. Some students miss the social aspect of being in a class with other people. In my opinion, online learning is a good option if you can manage your time well. However, it may not be suitable for everyone.

questions.question: What is one advantage of online learning mentioned in the text?
options: You can study at your own pace

questions.question: What is a disadvantage of online learning?
options: You need to be very disciplined

questions.question: What does the writer think about online learning?
options: It is better than traditional classes
It is only for young people
It is good if you manage time well

passages.title: Online learning has become very popular in recent years

passages.text: A strange thing happened to me last week. I was walking home when I found a wallet on the street. Inside, there was a lot of money and an ID card. I could have kept the money, but I knew that would be wrong. I took the wallet to the police station. The officer told me that the owner had already called to report the loss. They contacted the owner, and he came to pick it up. He was so grateful that he offered me a reward. I refused because I believe you should always do the right thing. If I lost my wallet, I would hope someone would return it too.

questions.question: What did the writer do with the item?
options: He gave it to a friend
He took it to the police
He left it on the street

questions.question: Why did the writer refuse the reward?
options: He thought the reward was too small
He believes in doing the right thing
He did not like the owner

passages.title: A strange thing happened to me last week
